alg.name: COMP 1
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于传奇的Ross™ Compressor压缩效果器音色。这是吉他压缩效果器的鼻祖，是它把吉他压缩效果带入大众并成为日后不可或缺的重要元素，它拥有十分自然圆润的压缩效果，能够有效增强吉他的延音。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on the legendary Ross™ Compressor. This is the originator of the guitar compression effect. It brings the guitar compression effect to the public and becomes an important element in the future. It has a very natural and mellow compression effect.
alg.paraCN:
Sustain：调节压缩量
Volume：调节效果输出音量
alg.paraEN:
Sustain: Controls the compression amount
Volume: Controls the effect output

alg.name: COMP 2
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于著名的Keeley® compressor*压缩效果器音色一款发烧级压缩效果器。分明的层次感，精确适量的高频让你的吉他听起来更清亮。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on the Keeley ® C4 4-knob compressor*. A recording studio - level compression effect.Clear sense of hierarchy, the right amount of high frequency makes your guitar sound brighter.
alg.paraCN:
Sustain：调节效果的压缩量
Volume：调节效果的输出音量
Attack：调节压缩效果器多久开始处理声音信号
Clipping：调节输入灵敏度
alg.paraEN:
Sustain: Controls the compression amount
Attack: Controls how soon the compressor starts to process the signal 
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Clipping: Controls the input sensitivity

alg.name: COMP 3
alg.descriptionCN: 功能⻬全的压缩效果，提供高品质，高可塑性的压缩音⾊
alg.descriptionEN: Flexible, fully adjustable compressor effect
alg.paraCN:
Threshold：调节压缩触发的阈值
Ratio：调节压缩比
Volume：调节输出音量
Attack：调节压缩效果起始时间
Release：调节压缩释放时间
Blend：控制原声与效果音的混合比例
Tone：调节压缩音色明亮度
alg.paraEN:
Threshold: Controls the compression trigger level 
Ratio: Controls the amount of compression when the compressor is triggered
Volume: Controls the output volume/makeup amount
Attack: Controls how soon the compressor starts to process the signal
Release: Controls how soon the compressor starts to release the signal level back to normal after the level drops below the threshold
Blend: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Tone: Controls the effect tone

alg.name: M-Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 基于MXR® M133 Micro Amp*经典激励单块建模。它有着最⼤20dB的增益量，可以在有效提升输出信号幅度的同时不改变原始⾳⾊⻛味。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on the legendary MXR® M133 Micro Amp2 pedal. Providing up to 20dB of gain, the Micro Boost elevates your amp sound without changing its tonal character.
alg.paraCN: Gain：调节增益量/输出⾳量
alg.paraEN: Gain: Controls the gain amount

alg.name: E-Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于著名的Xotic®EP Booster*激励效果器音色。提供+20dB的纯净激励提升，结实的低频，明亮的高频，使清音更加悦耳。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on famous Xotic® EP Booster* pedal. Provides +20DB of pure stimulation lift, strong low frequency, bright high frequency, making clear sound more pleasant.
alg.paraCN:
+3dB：选择最小增益是0dB还是+3dB
Bright：打开以增加额外的高频，关闭以保持平直频响
Volume：控制效果增益量/输出音量
alg.paraEN:
Volume: Controls the effect output/boost amount
+3dB: Selects the minimum boost amount from 0dB (off) to +3dB (on)
Bright: Selects the sound character from vintage (Bright off) to flat (Bright on)

alg.name: AC-Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于著名的Xotic®AC Booster *激励效果器音色，这是一个能够带来优美的激励/失真音色踏板，为电子管音箱带来额外的哼鸣音色。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on famous Xotic® AC Booster* pedal, It is a beautiful smooth sounding drive/boost pedal that it perfect for giving your tube amp a bit of extra grunt.
alg.paraCN:
Gain：控制效果增益量
Volume：调节效果输出音量
Bass：调节低频
Treble：调节高频
alg.paraEN:
Gain: Controls the gain amount 
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone

alg.name: BB-Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 任何吉他手都可以从Xotic®BB Preamp*过载效果器中受益。 它可以很好地产生厚重和奶油般的过载音色，并具有出色的延音效果，提供高达30dB的激励效果。
alg.descriptionEN: Any guitarist can benefit from the Xotic® BB Preamp* overdrive pedal. The pedal works equally well for getting thick and creamy overdrive tones with great sustain as it does for pushing the clean front end of an already driven amp with up to 30dB of boost.
alg.paraCN:
Gain：控制效果增益量
Volume：调节输出音量
Bass：调节低频
Treble：调节高频
alg.paraEN:
Gain: Controls the distortion amount 
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone

alg.name: RC-Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于著名的Xotic®RC Booster*，提供超纯净的20dB激励效果，而不会改变您精心制作的音色。 而且它提供了额外的增益通道，以增加音色的肥厚感。 利用均衡控件的高音和低音可调节+/- 15dB调节范围，控制谐波使吉他获得难以置信的音色。 均衡控件还可以补偿音量提供额外低音震撼力，非常适合匹配不同的吉他。
alg.descriptionEN: Based famous on Xotic® RC Booster* provides you with super-transparent 20dB boost without altering your carefully crafted tone. And it offers an added gain channel for extra fatness. Take advantage of the +/-15dB range on the treble and bass EQ controls, and imbue your guitar sound with unbelievable harmonic complexity. The EQ controls also compensate for the extra bass boominess the volume boost may cause and are great for matching the response for multiple guitars.
alg.paraCN:
Gain：控制效果增益量
Volume：调节输出音量
Bass：调节低频
Treble：调节高频
alg.paraEN:
Gain: Controls the gain amount 
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone

alg.name: Fat Boost
alg.descriptionCN: 这是一个干净的增益和前置放大器，带有可切换的低切滤波器以及独立控制的低音和高音。
alg.descriptionEN: This is a clean boost and pre-amp with a switchable low-cut filter and separate bass and treble controls.
alg.paraCN:
BASS：控制低频
TREBLE：控制高频
VOLUME：控制效果增益量/输出音量
FLAT/LOW CUT：打开或关闭低切滤波器（-6dB/Octave，频率200Hz）
alg.paraEN:
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone
Low Cut: Switches the low cut filter (-6dB/oct @200Hz) on/off

alg.name: AC Woody
alg.origin: Original: loosely based on TC Bodyrez
alg.descriptionCN: 专为压电式拾音器设计，可以为你的电箱琴提供更⾃然的箱体共鸣音⾊
alg.descriptionEN:
Designed for acoustic instruments, bringing you a 
more natural "woody" acoustic sound
alg.paraCN: Shape：控制效果音色细节
alg.paraEN: Shape: Controls the detailed effect character

alg.name: AC Sim
alg.descriptionCN: 为电吉他打造的箱琴模拟效果，原型来自经典的原声吉他模拟单块
alg.descriptionEN: Acoustic guitar simulator designed for guitars. Its prototype comes from a classic acoustic guitar analog stompbox.
alg.paraCN:
Body：控制原声吉他模拟的箱体共振
TREBLE：调节原声吉他的高频泛音和触弦音色
Volume：调节效果音量
Mode：选择音色模式
  STANDARD：模拟一个标准的木吉他音色
  JUMBO：模拟Jumbo型箱琴音色    
  ENHANCED：使木吉他效果拥有更多的泛音、更强的音头
  PIEZO：模拟琴桥压电拾音器音色
alg.paraEN:
Body: Controls the “body resonance” (low frequency response)
Top: Controls the upper harmonics (high frequency response)
Volume: Controls the effect output level
Mode: Selects from 4 different sound characters:
  Standard: Simulates the tonal characteristics of a standard acoustic guitar
  Jumbo: Simulates the tonal characteristics of a jumbo acoustic guitar 
  Enhanced: Simulates the tonal characteristics of an acoustic guitar with enhanced attack
  Piezo: Simulates the sound of a piezo pickup

alg.name: Gate 1
alg.origin:
ISP Decimator
Ampero Name: Smart Gate
alg.descriptionCN: 基于著名的ISP®Decimator™*噪音门单块。独创的“时间适量”技术来处理输入信号，能够对于信号进行几乎同步的反应并且对于低强度信号有着更加敏锐的响应。这使它具有极其自然的尾音，以及对原始音色的损失降低到最低。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on famous ISP®Decimator™* noise gate pedal. The Decimator features improvements in the expander tracking with their new Linearized Time Vector Processing™. This novel improvement provides a more linear release time-constant response for the exponential release curve of the downward expander.
alg.paraCN: Threshold：调节噪音门的触发阈值
alg.paraEN: Threshold: Controls the gate trigger level

alg.name: Gate 2
alg.descriptionCN: 可调范围丰富的噪⾳⻔效果
alg.descriptionEN: Flexible noise gate with attack and release control.
alg.paraCN:
Threshold：调节噪音门的触发阈值
Attack：选择噪音门的起始时间
Release：选择噪音门的释放时间
alg.paraEN:
Threshold: Controls the gate trigger level 
Attack: Controls how soon the gate starts to process the signal
Release: Controls the noise fade-out duration time after the level drops below the threshold

alg.name: Gate 3
alg.remark: 去掉Hysteresis此参数项；Side Chain参数固定为选项Prev FX，且不开放给用户
alg.descriptionCN: 精细可调参数噪音门，调节丰富细致，助您轻松获得干净精准的音色。
alg.descriptionEN: Precision adjustable noise gate with detailed controls for achieving clean, accurate tones effortlessly.
alg.paraCN:
Threshold：调节噪音门的触发阈值。Ratio：控制低于阈值的信号被削弱的程度，数值越大，降噪强度越大。Attack：选择噪音门的起始时间
Release：选择噪音门的释放时间
Hold：声音停止后，门限继续保持打开的时长，防止断音、颤音被误切断。
alg.paraEN:
Threshold: Controls the gate trigger level 
Ratio:Controls the degree to which signals below the threshold are attenuated. The higher the value, the stronger the noise reduction.Attack: Controls how soon the gate starts to process the signal
Release: Controls the noise fade-out duration time after the level drops below the threshold.
Hold:Sets how long the gate remains open after the sound stops, preventing accidental cutting off of notes or trills.

alg.name: Filter
alg.descriptionCN: 带有四个步进（Step）的⾃动滤波器效果，⽤于创造合成器⻛格的音⾊
alg.descriptionEN: A 4-step auto filter machine for creating synth-like sounds
alg.paraCN:
Step 1-4：控制滤波器每一个步进的中心频率
Rate：控制步进速度
Sync：打点定速同步开关
alg.paraEN:
Step 1-4: Controls the filter center frequency of each step
Rate: Controls the sequencing speed 
Sync: Switches Tap Tempo sync on/off

alg.name: Octaver
alg.descriptionCN: 提供自然的复音八度音效果。
alg.descriptionEN: Provides polyphonic octave effect.
alg.paraCN:
Low Oct：调节低八度效果音的音量
High Oct：调节高八度效果音的音量
Dry：调节干信号的音量
alg.paraEN:
Oct 1: Controls the volume of lower octave (1 oct down)
Oct 2: Controls the volume of higher octave (1 oct up)
Dry: Controls the dry signal level

alg.name: Dual Melody
alg.descriptionCN: 提供自然的移调效果。
alg.descriptionEN: Polyphonic pitch shifter/harmonizer.
alg.paraCN:
Hi Pitch：以半音为单位调节高音和声音高，最大+24（高2个八度）
Lo Pitch：以半音为单位调节低音和声音高，最大-24（低2个八度）
Dry：调节干信号的音量
Hi Volume：调节高音和声效果音量
Lo Volume：调节低音和声效果音量
alg.paraEN:
Low/Hi Pitch: Controls the low/high pitch shifting range by semitones 
Dry: Controls the dry signal level
Low/High Volume: Controls the low/high pitch volume

alg.name: Pitch
alg.descriptionCN: 提供⼀个简单有效的移调效果音色。
alg.descriptionEN: Polyphonic pitch shifter/harmonizer.
alg.paraCN:
H-Pitch:以全音为单位调节高音和声音高
L-Pitch:以全音为单位调节低音和声音高
Wet:调节和声效果音量
Dry:调节原声音量
Range:调节和声效果音高范围
alg.paraEN:
Low/Hi Pitch: Controls the low/high pitch shifting range by semitones 
Wet: Controls the wet signal level
Dry: Controls the dry signal level
Range: Controls the pitch range of harmony effect

alg.name: Harmony D
alg.origin: Original: dual voice auto harmonizer (Delay Line)
alg.descriptionCN: 这是一个单音移调/自动和声效果，它可以叠加两个和声效果音，根据您演奏的音符自动根据您的设置配上合适的和声。该效果有着丰富的参数，您可以对效果最终呈现的音色进行详细调节。
alg.descriptionEN: This model is a monophonic dual voice automatic harmonizer with max. one octave pitch shifting range. Detailed Key, Scale and Interval settings can bring you lots of fun.
alg.paraCN:
Mix： 调节效果干湿信号比
Key： 选择自动和声效果音的调号
Mode： 选择自动和声效果音的调性
Interval 1/2：  调节自动和声效果音相对于演奏音符的音程
Smooth Mode：  打开此开关可以使效果音音程能够平滑过度
alg.paraEN:
Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio of the effect
Key: Selects the chord key according to your music
Mode: Selects the scale mode according to your music
Interval 1/2: Selects the interval between wet and dry signal
Smooth Mode: Switch on to get a smooth note transition

widget.name: Key
widget.valueRange: C, C#, D, D#, E, F, F#, G, G#, A, A#, B

widget.name: Mode
widget.valueRange: Major, Minor, H. Minor, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Locrian

alg.name: Pitch S
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于经典的Whammy®* 单音移调效果器音色。可以将该效果的Position参数分配到表情踏板上，然后移动表情踏板即可听到效果。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on classic Whammy®* monophonic pitch shifter pedal. Assign the Position parameter to expression pedal, then move the pedal to get the effect.
alg.paraCN:
Range：选择踏板在最⼤位置时的移调⾳⾼
Position：⽤于模拟踏板位置变化
Mix：调节效果⼲湿信号⽐
Level：控制效果输出⾳量
alg.paraEN:
Range: Selects the pitch shifting range 
Position: Controls the pedal position (min=0, max=100) 
Mix: Controls the dry/wet signal ratio 
Level: Controls the effect output

widget.name: Range
widget.valueRange: -2 Oct, -1 Oct, +1 Oct, +2 Oct, +/-1 Oct, +/-2 Oct

alg.name: Ring Mod
alg.descriptionCN: 这是⼀款环形调制效果，用于制造⼀些有趣的失谐音色（比如钟声和铃声）。
alg.descriptionEN: A ring modulator for creating intresting inharmonic frequency spectra (like bells and chimes.
alg.paraCN:
Mix：控制原声与效果音的混合比例
Freq：粗调效果调制频率
Fine：以1Hz为单位精调调制频率
Tone：调节效果音色明亮度
alg.paraEN:
Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Freq: Controls the overall modulation frequency
Fine: Fine tune the modulation frequency by +/- 50Hz
Tone: Controls the effect tone

alg.name: Tape Mod
alg.descriptionCN: 模拟老式磁带录音机的声音特征，为声音增加饱和度。
alg.descriptionEN: Vintage tape saturation simulater providing analog warmth and natural distortion.
alg.paraCN:
Volume：调节效果输出音量
Saturation：调节效果饱和度（增益量）
Mix：调节效果干湿信号比
High Cut：调节高频信号衰减量
alg.paraEN:
Saturation: Controls the effect gain
Mix: Controls the effect wet/dry signal ratio
Volume: Controls the effect output volume
Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
High Cut: Cuts the effect high frequency signal

alg.name: Voks Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于传奇的VOX® V845* 哇音效果器音色。最早出现的哇音踏板，最初的设计目的是让经过拾音的管乐发出更有情绪表现力的“哇哇”声。幅度较小，作用在中频至高频之间。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on legendary VOX® V846* wah pedal. The earliest wa-wah pedal was originally designed to allow the wind instrument passing through it to produce a more emotionally expressive "wa-wah" sound.The amplitude is small and acts between medium and high frequency.
alg.paraCN:
Range：控制哇音滤波器中心频率
Q：调节哇音滤波器Q值
Volume：控制哇音音量
将表情踏板作为哇音使用时，请将Position参数分配到
表情踏板上，此时打开并踩踏表情踏板即可听到效果
alg.paraEN:
Range: Controls the wah filter frequency range
Q: Controls the wah resonance (filter Q)
Volume: Controls the effect output
When using the EXP pedal as a wah pedal, remember to first assign the position parameters, then turn on and press the pedal to get the effect.

alg.name: Cry Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于传奇的Dunlop® CryBaby®*哇音效果器色。60年代经典的传统哇音踏板，作用在低频至中频之间，幅度适中，音色中性。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on legendary Dunlop® CryBaby®* wah pedal. The classic 60's traditional wha pedal, acting between low and medium frequency, moderate amplitude, neutral timbre.

alg.name: Rack Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于John Petrucci的机架哇音效果器设置，此款Dunlop® Cry Baby®* Wah具有音量，Q和六个均衡控件，可最终控制您的哇音音色。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on John Petrucci's rack wah settings, this Cry Baby® Wah features Volume, Q, and six EQ controls for ultimate tonal control over your wah sound.

alg.name: Bass Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 专为Bass设计的哇音效果
alg.descriptionEN: Wah designed for basses

alg.name: Touch Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 通过演奏力度控制哇音音色。具有宽广调节范围的包络滤波器（Touch Wah）效果，极高的敏锐度，能够快速的捕捉你的弹奏，随着演奏⼒度的强弱⽽变化；提供吉他模式和贝斯模式两种可选。
alg.descriptionEN: Control the wah sound by playing intensity.A wide range d envelope filter (a.k.a. touch wah) designed for guitarists and bassists  that is touch-sensitive and flexible
alg.paraCN:
Sens：调节灵敏度，参数值越高灵敏度越高
Range：调节哇音滤波器中心频率
Q：调节哇音滤波器Q值
Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Mode：选择用于吉他（Guitar）还是用于贝斯（Bass）
alg.paraEN:
Sens: Controls the effect sensitivity
Range: Controls the frequency range of the filter
Q: Controls the sharpness of the filter
Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Mode: Selects from two modes: Guitar/Bass

alg.name: Auto Wah
alg.descriptionCN: 通过设定频率使哇音有规律地进行工作。提供多样的自动哇音（Auto Wah）效果，吉他和贝斯都可以使用。
alg.descriptionEN: Set the rate to make the wah pedal work regularly. Providing a variable auto wah effect for both guitars and basses.
alg.paraCN:
Depth：控制效果深度
Rate：控制效果速度
Volume：控制效果音量
Low/High：控制效果低频/高频频点
Q：调节滤波器Q值
Sync：打点定速同步开关
alg.paraEN:
Depth: Controls the effect depth
Rate: Controls the effect speed
Volume: Controls the output level
Low: Controls the bottom point of center frequency (low freq)
High: Controls the top point of center frequency (high freq)
Q: Controls the sharpness of the filter
Sync: Switches Tap Tempo sync on/off

alg.name: Skreamer
alg.descriptionCN: 声音基于著名的Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®*过载/激励效果器音色。自1979年第一次展示在世界面前，TS808就开拓了一个新的世界。热爱它的吉他演奏家不胜枚举。它是一款温暖、细腻的过载效果器。可以作为过载使用，也可以作为Boost使用，适用的音乐风格极其广阔。
alg.descriptionEN: Based on legenary Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®* overdrive pedal. Since it was first shown to the world in 1979, TS808 has opened up a new world. There are countless guitarists who love it. It is a warm, delicate overdrive effect.Can be used as either an overdrive or a Boost, can be used in a variety of musical styles.
alg.paraCN:
Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
Volume：调节效果音量
alg.paraEN:
Gain: Controls the overdrive amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone 
Volume: Controls the effect output

alg.name: Skreamer 9
alg.descriptionCN: Ibanez® Tube Screamer®是当今许多顶级吉他手使用的透明过载音调的代名词。 TS9踏板可增强吉他信号，足以驱动您的放大器的前置放大器级，从而使音色听起来自然自然，纯净超速运转和清晰的节奏。
alg.descriptionEN: The Ibanez® Tube Screamer® is synonymous with the transparent overdrive tone used by many of today's top guitarists. The TS9 pedal boosts the guitar signal enough to drive the preamp stage of your amp, giving a very natural-sounding and pure overdrive and crisp rhythm crunch.
alg.paraCN:
Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
Volume：调节效果音量
alg.paraEN:
Gain: Controls the overdrive amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone 
Volume: Controls the effect output

alg.name: Butter OD
